MOS Target Table: zari18pms

## Basic Information
Pre-main sequence (PMS) catalogue from Zari+2018.

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_zari18pms.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
2 MB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### source

- Column Name: source
- Description: Unique source identifier (Gaia DR2 source_id)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### glon

- Column Name: glon
- Description: Galactic longitude
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### glat

- Column Name: glat
- Description: Galactic latitude
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### plx

- Column Name: plx
- Description: Parallax
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float32


#### e_plx

- Column Name: e_plx
- Description: Standard error of parallax (parallax_error)
- Unit: mas
- Data Type: Float32


#### pmglon

- Column Name: pmglon
- Description: Proper motion in galactic longitude
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float32


#### e_pmglon

- Column Name: e_pmglon
- Description: Standard error of proper motion in galactic longitude
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float32


#### pmglat

- Column Name: pmglat
- Description: Proper motion in galactic latitude
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float32


#### e_pmglat

- Column Name: e_pmglat
- Description: Standard error of proper motion in galactic latitude
- Unit: mas/yr
- Data Type: Float32


#### pmlbcorr

- Column Name: pmlbcorr
- Description: Correlation between proper motion in galactic longitude and proper motion in galactic latitude
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### rv

- Column Name: rv
- Description: radial velocity
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### e_rv

- Column Name: e_rv
- Description: radial velocity error
- Unit: km/s
- Data Type: Float32


#### gmag

- Column Name: gmag
- Description: G-band mean magnitude (phot_g_mean_mag)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### bpmag

- Column Name: bpmag
- Description: BP-band mean magnitude (phot_bp_mean_mag)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### rpmag

- Column Name: rpmag
- Description: RP-band mean magnitude (phot_g_mean_mag)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### bp_over_rp

- Column Name: bp_over_rp
- Description: BP/RP excess factor
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### chi2al

- Column Name: chi2al
- Description: AL chi-square value (astrometric_chi2_al)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ngal

- Column Name: ngal
- Description: Number of good observation AL (astrometric_n_good_obs_al)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### ag

- Column Name: ag
- Description: Extinction in G-band (A_G)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### bp_rp

- Column Name: bp_rp
- Description: Colour excess in BP-RP
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### uwe

- Column Name: uwe
- Description: Unit Weight Error, as defined in Lindegren et al., 2018A&A...616A...2L
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


---

None
